'''Spade''' was an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] and one of a group of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] left behind on [[Pengalan IV]] after their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] was shot down during a full scale [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Battle of Pengalan IV|retreat]].

==Biography==
Abandoned with his fellow troopers and a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] accountant named [[Joram Kithe]], they were on their own to figure out how to get off the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. When Kithe awoke and revealed that he had been commissioned as a [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], Spade was the one of the first troopers to speak to him.

Kithe was disturbed by the troopers' reliance on proper procedure, and tried to foster individuality in them. To that end, he gave the troopers nicknames. Spade gained his nickname because he was digging graves for the gunship's dead and leaning on his shovel the first time Kithe spoke to him.

After making their way to [[Tur Lorkin]], the nearest village, and infiltrating a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] bay, [[Tooth (clone)|Tooth]] and Kithe realized that the village was in fact the site of the [[diamond boron missile]] manufacturing facility, not the factory which had been the site of the earlier trap.

Determined to destroy it, Tooth faced Kithe and was willing to defy the man's orders to complete his mission. Impressed, Kithe relented. The troopers sabotaged the factory with Kithe's aid while Tooth stole a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] ship to draw the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] away from the starship bay, allowing Kithe and the remaining troopers to escape. Spade took point in the assault on the factory. He did not survive the fighting on the way out.
